---
title: "Creating A Legal Hold Case"
---

Legal hold cases store the records that may be needed for a legal case or an investigation. Creating a legal hold case allows you to secure and organize critical information, preventing accidental deletion or modification.

To create a legal hold case:

1.  Go to the Legal Hold Management interface. For information on accessing Legal Hold Management, see Accessing Legal Hold Management.
2.  Click the Create Legal Hold Case button. The Create Legal Hold Case window is displayed. ![The Create Legal Hold Case window](data:image/png;base64,)
3.  Enter a unique name for the legal hold case in the Name field.  Note: The legal hold case name in the Legal Hold Case Name field can't exceed 64 characters.
4.  Enter the reason this legal hold case is required in the Reason field.  Note: The legal hold case reason in the Legal Hold Case Reason field can't exceed 512 characters.
5.  Optional: Add a description for the legal hold case in the Description field.  Note: The legal hold case description in the Legal Hold Case Description field can't exceed 512 characters.
6.  Click the Create Legal Hold Case button. A message confirming a successful legal hold case creation is displayed.
When you create a legal hold case, you can add records to the legal hold. For more on adding a record to a legal hold, see Adding a Record to a Legal Hold Case.
